prompt: Photoreal cinematic editorial photo, dawn emergency in a suburban Colorado kitchen: licensed plumber in clean navy uniform kneels at an open under-sink cabinet, controlled water spray from a burst line, branded generic tool bag at frame edge, homeowner soft-focused in background, warm practical lighting, realistic skin and fabric texture, 50mm lens depth, trustworthy calm problem-solving moment.
